judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the final execute_python step (function-call-2834725005017580562), after merging reviews with business metadata, the agent incorrectly summed each business's overall review_count from the business collection for category totals instead of counting the number of qualifying review rows by 2016-registered users, leading to wrong categories.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After correctly filtering reviews by 2016-registered users (var_function-call-743341897959759894), the agent looked up business categories but only retrieved 5 of 26 businesses from the business collection (var_function-call-13623862921968931342) and then computed top categories from this incomplete, heuristically parsed set (var_function-call-3824971280866148562), leading to an incorrect final answer.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After counting reviews by business (var_function-call-1686845304197484874) and fetching business descriptions (var_function-call-9168975916217964451), the agent used a faulty regex/splitting approach in execute_python (var_function-call-12473634105085462402) to extract categories from free-text descriptions, mis-parsing entries (e.g., producing "and Waxing") and yielding incorrect top categories.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent followed the right tables but implemented brittle category extraction from business descriptions (using only a few string patterns and even counting "and Waxing" as a category), and with only five business documents retrieved, it missed categories like Restaurants, Food, and Shopping, leading to incorrect top-5 results.

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After correctly fetching reviews by 2016-registered users (var_function-call-17929306058533680071), the agent incorrectly implemented the category aggregation by inner-joining with only five business documents returned from Mongo (var_function-call-3247965914215238097) and using a brittle description parser (var_function-call-2144542371537530944) that split categories like "Beauty & Spas" into "Beauty" and "Spas," resulting in wrong top categories.

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
